question: What are our top 10 brands by revenue?
sql: SELECT p.brand, ROUND(SUM(oi.sale_price), 2) AS revenue, COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) AS orders FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` oi JOIN `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` p ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.status IN ('Complete', 'Shipped') GROUP BY p.brand ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10
analyst_notes: Standard revenue definition. Brands are long-tail: always LIMIT and show order counts alongside revenue so one big order doesn't read as brand strength.
author: claude-draft
